brief: The UN warns the Middle East crisis is spiraling as US strikes in Iran continue and Houthi attacks threaten global trade, while Trump imposes new tariffs on over 80 nations citing forced labor. In tech, studies explore transparent AI advisors, creative writing on smart glasses, and inclusive AR for deaf students.
news_summary: UN chief Guterres warns the Middle East conflict is 'spiraling out of control' as the US launches more strikes in Iran and Houthi rebels threaten Red Sea shipping. Meanwhile, Trump announces new tariffs on over 80 countries over forced labor concerns, and Pentagon underreports US troop deaths in the Iran war.
papers_summary: New papers examine usability of transparent conversational AI product advisors, wearable AI for creative writing on smart glasses, and service provider perspectives on AR accessibility for deaf students. Other works address clinical assay workflow optimization and ethical AI for dementia care.

en.brief: The UN warns the Middle East crisis is spiraling as US strikes in Iran continue and Houthi attacks threaten global trade, while Trump imposes new tariffs on over 80 nations citing forced labor. In tech, studies explore transparent AI advisors, creative writing on smart glasses, and inclusive AR for deaf students.
en.news_summary: UN chief Guterres warns the Middle East conflict is 'spiraling out of control' as the US launches more strikes in Iran and Houthi rebels threaten Red Sea shipping. Meanwhile, Trump announces new tariffs on over 80 countries over forced labor concerns, and Pentagon underreports US troop deaths in the Iran war.
en.papers_summary: New papers examine usability of transparent conversational AI product advisors, wearable AI for creative writing on smart glasses, and service provider perspectives on AR accessibility for deaf students. Other works address clinical assay workflow optimization and ethical AI for dementia care.

zh.brief: 中东紧张局势升级，胡塞武装威胁曼德海峡，美国对多国加征关税。AI取代工作话题持续升温。香港前议员胡志伟在英险被遣返。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武装威胁曼德海峡，可能扰乱全球航运；美国以强迫劳动为由对80多国加征10%-12.5%关税。香港47人案前议员胡志伟在伦敦机场被扣留后获准入境。
zh.papers_summary: 无中文论文优先项。英文论文探讨AI透明性、AR无障碍、临床工作流优化等课题。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. spreads unpredictably beneath the surface, the Middle East crisis spirals beyond control.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
